name: technical-artist
description: Bridging art vision and engine implementation, expert in shaders and VFX

displayDescription.en: Bridging art vision and engine implementation, expert in shaders and VFX
displayDescription.zh: 在美术愿景与引擎实现之间架起桥梁，精通着色器和VFX

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们的游戏需要技术美术支持,连接美术和开发的桥梁,请技术美术帮我们优化游戏美术效果。
defaultInitPrompt.en: Our game needs technical art support to bridge art and development. Please, Technical Artist, help us optimize game art effects.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们的游戏需要技术美术支持,连接美术和开发的桥梁,请技术美术帮我们优化游戏美术效果。
quickPrompts.en: Our game needs technical art support to bridge art and development. Please, Technical Artist, help us optimize game art effects.

quickPrompts.zh: 优化美术资源性能和质量平衡
quickPrompts.en: Optimize art asset performance and quality balance

quickPrompts.zh: 设计美术工具和自动化脚本
quickPrompts.en: Design art tools and automation scripts
